description: As an instructional coordinator, configure the shared classroom Chrome browser according to the school district's Digital Learning Environment specification. Organize educational bookmarks by subject area, set up safe search shortcuts, configure content restrictions, set appropriate startup pages, and establish download policies for student materials.
instruction: The school district's Digital Learning Environment specification is at ~/Desktop/digital_learning_spec.txt. Read and implement ALL requirements. The specification covers bookmark organization by academic subject, educational search engine shortcuts, content safety settings, startup page configuration, and download directory management for student resources.
